title: Monolithic Power Systems Investor Relations Overview
note: Company-provided overview describing MPS as a global provider of high-performance semiconductor-based power electronics solutions and summarizing its core strengths.

title: Monolithic Power Systems 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K
note: Primary filing source for business description, product families, end-market exposure, 2025 revenue, gross profit, gross margin, and risk context.

title: Monolithic Power Systems Market Cap
note: Point-in-time market capitalization source reporting $78.11 billion as of May 22, 2026 and historical market-cap data beginning on the IPO trading date.

title: Monolithic Power Systems Stock Price & Overview
note: Market profile source for ticker, exchange, IPO date, sector, product overview, revenue, net income, share count, and valuation context.

title: Monolithic Power Systems P/E Ratio
note: Point-in-time valuation source reporting MPWR's trailing P/E ratio as of May 22, 2026.

title: Monolithic Power Systems Final IPO Prospectus
note: Final prospectus dated November 18, 2004 documenting the initial public offering, share count, $8.50 offering price, proceeds, and Nasdaq symbol MPWR.

title: Libre Solar Project GitHub Organization
note: Open hardware and firmware repositories for DC energy systems, MPPT charge controllers, and battery management boards.

title: LibreSolar MPPT 2420 LC Repository
note: Repository for an open-source MPPT solar charge controller with KiCad files, BOM, documentation, and licensing notes.

title: Building DC Energy Systems
note: Technical documentation for open DC energy-system development and contribution through GitHub.

title: OpenInverter Wiki
note: Community documentation describing open-source inverter control firmware and related EV conversion systems including inverters, batteries, chargers, and DC-DC converters.

title: OpenInverter Downloads
note: Downloads page noting availability of firmware source code, binaries, schematics, and tools.

title: Open Source Inverter
note: Open hardware concept page for inverter development and local power applications, useful as an enabling reference for distributed power-electronics fabrication concepts.
